parameters.jsCode:
// Collapse all loop output items into a single trigger so Read Unnotified executes only once
return [{json: {trigger: true}}];

parameters.text: ✅ Job search ran successfully — no new openings found this run.

parameters.content:
## Triggers

**Schedule:** Runs at 7 AM and 7 PM IST daily (default 24h window).

**Manual:** Click 'Execute Workflow' for ad-hoc runs.

**Telegram:** Message your bot with:
- `/jobs` — search last 12 hours (default)
- `/jobs 6` — search last 6 hours
- `/jobs 24` — search last 24 hours

**Tip:** Scheduled runs always use 24h window. Only Telegram commands support custom time windows.

## Config Sheet
Reads company list from Google Sheet 'Config' tab.
Columns: **Company** | **CompanyID** | **Bucket** (1-4) | **Active** (TRUE/FALSE)
To add a company: add row, assign bucket, set Active=TRUE. Next run picks it up.

## Search Loop
For each bucket URL: fetch LinkedIn search page → extract job cards (links + titles + companies) → apply negative title filter → dedup against existing results → accumulate new links.

Negative filters: staff, principal, lead, manager, director, ios, android, ML, data science, QA, SDET, DevOps, SRE, frontend, intern, test, platform, infra, cloud, security, mobile, embedded.
Buckets 1 & 2 also filter 'senior'.

## Job Processing Loop
For each new job: fetch detail page → parse title/company/location/description → extract experience requirement via regex → skip if >5 years → tag with PrimaryTag → write to Results sheet.

Experience patterns: '3+ years', '3-5 years', 'minimum 3 years', 'at least 3 yrs'. Roles with unparseable experience pass through as 'Not specified' for manual review.

## Notification & LLM Pipeline
After job processing: Read Resume → Prepare LLM Input → Call Gemini Flash → Parse LLM Response → Read Unnotified → Format Telegram (enriched with match % or plain fallback) → send → mark as notified with Score.
Handles leftover unnotified jobs from previous failed runs too. LLM failure falls back gracefully to plain format.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json', temperature: 0.1, maxOutputTokens: 65536, thinkingConfig: { thinkingBudget: 0 } } }) }}
